stops.title: B.Tech CSE begins
stops.detail: Computer Science & Engineering at Vellore Institute of Technology. Graduated 2024 with a CGPA of 8.07 — after DPS Ranchi (95% in both X and XII, CBSE).

stops.title: Summer Intern · CNS Dept
stops.detail: Operational exposure to Communication, Navigation & Surveillance systems and the network infrastructure that keeps a major airport running.

stops.title: Research Intern
stops.detail: Co-developed a Log Score solution assessing log-volume impact from a codebase — awarded a Certificate of Excellence for it. (Aug 2022 – Feb 2023)

stops.title: Summer Intern · R&D Labs
stops.detail: Smart Systems Lab at the R&D Centre for Iron & Steel. ML project 'APRIC' and my first hands-on exposure to LLMs and chatbots (GPT-2 era).

stops.title: Graduated + AgriSecure capstone
stops.detail: Shipped AgriSecure — blockchain-backed crop insurance with a Compose app and ESP-32 sensors — and closed out the B.Tech at CGPA 8.07.

stops.title: SDE-1 · AI & Data
stops.detail: Building an enterprise GenAI Agent Builder for a Tier-1 US telecom: FastAPI + SQLAlchemy metadata services, a LangGraph execution engine with dynamic tools, Redis-backed stateful agents, and a Pytest regression suite that cut client-reported defects by ~80%.

stops.title: Next stop
stops.detail: Deeper into LLM internals, MCP and production agent platforms — and an AI twin of me somewhere in this house.
